## Checklist

<!-- Make sure all of these are done before submitting -->

- [ ] I pulled the latest changes from `main` before starting (`git pull origin main`)
- [ ] I worked on a separate branch — not directly on `main`
- [ ] I followed the naming conventions from `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I tested the content locally with `npm start`
- [ ] If I added a simulation — I tested it works and is responsive
- [ ] If I added images — they are named descriptively (not `IMG_0022.png`)
- [ ] My commit messages are clear and descriptive
